overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character wearing a traditional straw cape (mino) and conical hat walking through deep snow on a mountainous ridge. The scene transitions from a dense foggy forest to panoramic mountain vistas as the fog clears, revealing snow-capped peaks and forested valleys below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountainside forest in heavy fog

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through deep snow in a foggy pine forest, wearing a straw mino cape

tall pine tree with heavy snow accumulation on branches
tall pine tree with heavy snow accumulation on branches
deep snow covering the mountain slope with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, foggy pine forest on a snowy mountainside. Visibility is limited by heavy mist and falling snow, with snow-laden trees surrounding the path. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated as the character trudges uphill through deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: fog clears revealing expansive snow-capped mountain range and forested valley below

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill along the snowy ridge as the vista opens up to reveal distant mountains

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks with mist drifting between summits
dense evergreen forest covering the valley floor visible below the ridge

segments.scene_description: As the fog lifts, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of snow-covered mountain ranges and a forested valley below. The character continues along the exposed ridge, with the weather clearing to reveal the vast landscape while scattered pine trees dot the snowy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: windy snow-covered mountain ridge with rock outcroppings

events.description: wind picks up blowing snow across the ridge as clouds shift overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow snowy ridge with mountains visible in the distance, navigating around rock formations

entered.detail: large boulder formation covered in snow along the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the exposed snowy ridge as wind blows snow across the path. Large snow-covered rock outcroppings appear on the right side while the mountain range shifts to the left of the frame. The visibility remains good but the weather appears to be shifting with increased wind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, snowy forest that gradually opens into a vast, wind-swept mountain panorama. It begins with the character trudging uphill through a dense pine forest, where heavy mist and falling snow severely limit visibility among the snow-laden trees. As the fog lifts, the scene expands to reveal a breathtaking view of distant snow-covered mountain ranges and a deep forested valley below. The camera then follows the character along an exposed ridge as the weather clears further, before turning toward large snow-covered rock outcroppings while wind begins to whip snow across the path.
